form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 10th over 2850m at Laval beaten 64m by Kel Air D'eole in 6-8yo gelding race on March 28 at $179. Before that 15th (25m) over 2700m at Machecoul well beaten by Jouvence D'avril in 7-10yo amateur drivers handicap on March 15. Shouldn't trouble the top few.
